title: Device Home Screen - No device connected - Select Device link
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app home screen "Select Device" link navigates to device list with "Other devices" button opening Poly support web page when no device is connected
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Observe the Home screen when no device is connected.
3. Tap the "Select Device" link displayed on the Home screen.
4. Observe the list of supported devices with images.
5. Scroll to the bottom of the list.
expected: Tapping "Other devices" opens the Poly support web page with information about additional compatible devices.
